title: Dancing Queen
meaning_summary: Dancing Queen remains commercially durable because it is instantly recognizable, broadly usable, and still functions as shorthand for euphoric pop.
revenue_drivers: Global pop and disco nostalgia playlists keep the song active across generations.
Film, party, wedding, and stage-musical associations reinforce recurring demand.
Its melody and title recognition make it unusually sync-friendly for a 1970s pop single.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate models evergreen streaming, disco nostalgia, stage and film adjacency, and strong songwriter-side participation.

ownership.master_owner: Polar/major-label catalog economics with artist-side participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears highly valuable because ABBA songwriting is central to the catalog economics
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific sale adjustment is modeled
ownership.notes: Modeled range reflects long-tail global pop catalog behavior.
